title: Thai-Style Glazed Korean Chicken Bowl
description: A sweet and spicy Thai-inspired chicken dish served over a flavorful bowl.
instructions: 2. In a blender or food processor, combine chili flakes, brown sugar, soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar, garlic, and ginger. Blend until smooth.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together the blended sauce and 2 tablespoons of coconut oil.
4. Add the chicken breasts to the bowl and toss to coat with the sauce.
5. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the chicken breasts on the sheet.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
7. While the chicken is baking, cook your choice of rice or noodles according to package instructions.
8. To assemble the bowls, place a scoop of cooked rice or noodles on a plate, then top with a piece of baked chicken.
9. Garnish with sliced green onions and serve immediately.
